description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in (1) Request-spk.xuda and (2) Add-msie-request.xuda in RSA KEON Registration Authority Web Interface 1.0 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via unspecified vectors.
